# Zed

Code editor by Zed Industries. Rust-based, GPU-accelerated; emphasises low-latency multi-pane editing and built-in collaboration. Includes integrated AI assistant features and supports multiple LLM backends.

## Use at Janus

One of Michael's two primary editors (alongside [[vs-code]]).
